title: eryngium fontanum
intro: Eryngium fontanum, also known as sea holly or sea eryngo, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eryngium fontanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve gut health, and boost the immune system. Eryngium fontanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a decorative element in floral arrangements.
